title: werauhia latissima
intro: Werauhia latissima, also known as the 'Giant Prionium', is a species of plant in the family Bromeliaceae, native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in Maori medicine, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of bromelain, a proteolytic enzyme that breaks down proteins into smaller peptides and amino acids. The health benefits of Werauhia latissima include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its possible antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Werauhia latissima are typically made from its leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, or dried for later use.
